truth.label: DEPRECATED_API
truth.expected: The legacy com.mysql.jdbc.Driver class is used instead of the Connector/J 8 driver class.

zero_shot.reason: The report focuses on hardcoded credentials and security weaknesses, but does not mention the deprecated driver class 'com.mysql.jdbc.Driver' or the need to use the modern 'com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver'. It fails to identify the target defect.

single_step.reason: The report explicitly lists 'Deprecated MySQL JDBC driver class name' as an issue and recommends using 'com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver' in the refactoring section. This correctly identifies the target defect with a technically accurate explanation.

three_stage.reason: The report identifies a missing documentation issue and a typo, but does not mention the deprecated driver class. It retains the old driver string 'com.mysql.jdbc.Driver' in the corrected code, failing to address the target defect.
